name: Toxic Matango Sign
Description: A marked location of where one of the dangerous Toxic Matango are, so adventurers can easily avoid them.

theScene: As you trek through the twisting caverns you come across a fork in the path and a sign. A warning to all adventurers that one of the paths is infested by a Toxic Matango, a very dangerous and predatory fungus woman, and that everyone should take the detour despite its length. (Inventory is currently available.)
Ignore the sign and proceed into the Toxic Matango's passageway.
Take the long boring detour. (Lose up to 50 energy.)
